case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. OCTAVIO F MAGALONG

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 16216004) AS TO DEFENDANT MAGALONG, OCTAVIO F
